top_signals.title: Euro-Zone Wage Growth Slowed Before War Drove Inflation Higher
top_signals.summary: A key measure of euro-area pay growth slowed, providing some relief to European Central Bank officials worrying about emerging inflation risks from the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘A big mistake’: The ECB is ‘hell-bent’ on rate hikes despite recession risks, senior economist warns
top_signals.summary: Berenberg's chief economist said ECB rate rises would be a "big mistake" amid growing signs of European stagflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Worst-Case Scenario Looks More Likely for European Stocks
top_signals.summary: Unless the Strait of Hormuz reopens soon, the case for European stocks will degrade materially, according to strategists surveyed by Bloomberg.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump administration says new EPA rules will save you money at the supermarket. It's not clear they will
top_signals.summary: Trump delayed Biden-era EPA refrigerant rules, saying the move will lower grocery costs, though the impact on food prices remains unclear.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
